cleaned_text:
I need to write a poem about books. 
Alone I stand between people,I have learned so much from,But never met. Pages whisper secrets softly,Each tale a world I've quietly come upon.Alone I stand to read,Page who would have never,Misread,The lonely villains,And the mysterious witches.In their embrace, I find myself a new home.

When I was young, I went to a new program where I knew no one. I felt very anxious about being the only one to join the program "late". 
As I walked into the room and saw everyone already chatting in small groups, my heart sank and I wondered if I had made a terrible mistake.
I knew I wanted to be there, and because of that I kept telling myself that its okay.
in the end, i made friends there, they were excited to see me and did not give me weird looks about being the new student there.

the instructions specify that i need to write about nature. 
I am not sure what to write about, let me press on the LLM assistant button. 
I stepped into the forest like entering an empire build by nature. The profound quietness that settles deep within the soul, I love that. The air itself feels different. It is clean, cool, and carrying the earthy scent.

hello, i am writing about my love for books. 
Books are a door from one world to another, without needing a plane ticket.
I'm very grateful for the books I have read throughout my life, they taught me many things.
yeah. ugh I need to write more. I love books. They just gave me perspectives about life I wouldn't have gotten on my own.
